There are 4 possible senarios
1. mask.any() and convert:
return [b.convert(numeric=False, copy=True) for b in block]
2. mask.any() and not convert:
return block
3. not mask.any() and convert
return [self.convert(numeric=False, copy=True)]
4. not mask.any() and not convert
return self
